1.NAME: Infantry
1.NATK: Strikes nearby enemies with a sword.
1.SATK: Delivers a powerful strike that damages enemies and has a chance to stun them.

2.NAME: Heavy Armor
2.NATK: Attacks nearby enemies with a melee strike.
2.SATK: After attacking, deploys a power shield that blocks almost all physical and magic damage for a period of time.

3.NAME: Firebird
3.NATK: Soars through the sky and launches flaming shots from extreme range.
3.SATK: Fires a powerful fireball that deals heavy damage and has a chance to stun enemies.

4.NAME: Gunner
4.NATK: Attacks enemies from range with precise shots.
4.SATK: Fires a powerful projectile that guarantees a stun.

5.NAME: Hammer Knight
5.NATK: Delivers a melee blow with a heavy hammer.
5.SATK: Slams the ground with great force, dealing AoE damage to nearby enemies, with a chance to stun them and trigger Taunt.

6.NAME: Mounted Knight
6.NATK: Unleashes a rapid flurry of melee hits on enemies.
6.SATK: Launches a combo attack that alternates between the main target and nearby enemies. Taunt triggers after a certain number of uses.

7.NAME: Elf Archer
7.NATK: Fires arrows to attack enemies from range.
7.SATK: Fires 3 arrows at once, hitting up to 3 enemies simultaneously.

8.NAME: Elf Warrior
8.NATK: Strikes enemies with a melee double hit.
8.SATK: Unleashes a triple-hit combo with 1.5x power, dealing heavy melee damage.

9.NAME: Poison Archer
9.NATK: Fires a poison arrow that reduces enemies' movement speed and attack speed.
9.SATK: Fires a 1.5x power poison arrow that creates a poison cloud and slows nearby enemies.

10.NAME: High Elf Archer
10.NATK: Attacks enemies from range with precise magic arrows.
10.SATK: Rapidly fires magic arrows to hit multiple enemies at once.

11.NAME: Green Eagle
11.NATK: Soars through the sky and fires ranged projectiles at enemies.
11.SATK: Launches 3 consecutive wind attacks, dealing damage and knocking enemies back.

12.NAME: Wind Mage
12.NATK: Launches an energy ball to attack enemies from range.
12.SATK: Summons a tornado at the enemy's location, dealing sustained damage.

13.NAME: Skeleton Soldier
13.NATK: Attacks nearby enemies using a bone as a weapon.
13.SATK: Delivers a heavy strike that deals massive damage and has a chance to stun enemies.

14.NAME: Dark Mage
14.NATK: Attacks enemies from range with dark bullets.
14.SATK: Fires a dark orb that deals massive damage to enemies.

15.NAME: Ghost
15.NATK: Attacks enemies from range with a spirit orb.
15.SATK: Becomes invisible and avoids enemy targeting for a certain period of time.

16.NAME: Skeleton Warrior
16.NATK: Strikes enemies with a melee double hit.
16.SATK: While invisible, unleashes a rapid flurry of attacks that deals multiple hits.

17.NAME: Great Hammer
17.NATK: Strikes enemies with a hammer and has a chance to stun them.
17.SATK: Delivers a heavy strike that deals massive damage, inflicts AoE damage on nearby enemies, and has a chance to stun them.

18.NAME: Dark Sorcerer
18.NATK: Fires dark projectiles from a distance and periodically summons skeleton soldiers.
18.SATK: Curses enemies, grants a shield to allies, and summons skeletons.

19.NAME: Orc Fighter
19.NATK: Attacks enemies with a rapid double melee strike.
19.SATK: Delivers a heavy strike that deals massive damage and knocks enemies back.

20.NAME: Orc Hunter
20.NATK: Attacks enemies with a melee strike.
20.SATK: Teleports to the farthest enemy, delivers a heavy strike, freezes the target, and grants itself a ranged evasion buff.

21.NAME: Frost Mage
21.NATK: Fires ice magic projectiles to attack enemies from a distance.
21.SATK: Fires enhanced freezing projectiles that deal massive damage to enemies.

22.NAME: Orc Wing
22.NATK: Fires energy projectiles from the air to attack enemies at range.
22.SATK: Fires enhanced energy projectiles that deal massive damage.

23.NAME: Orc Axeman
23.NATK: Strikes with an axe in melee and deals AoE damage to enemies ahead.
23.SATK: After a melee attack, throws an axe to strike additional enemies. Can also hit airborne enemies.

24.NAME: Orc Hammerman
24.NATK: Attacks enemies in melee with a hammer.
24.SATK: Summons an ice decoy to draw enemy attacks in your place.

25.NAME: Wolf Rider
25.NATK: Deals AoE damage to nearby enemies along with a melee attack.
25.SATK: Summons a wolf and grants nearby allies a movement speed and attack speed buff. Activates Taunt after a set number of uses.

26.NAME: Infantry Ⅱ
26.NATK: Slashes enemies with a sword in melee.
26.SATK: Unleashes a powerful strike that deals greater damage and stuns enemies with a higher chance.

27.NAME: Heavy Armor Ⅱ
27.NATK: Attacks enemies with a melee strike.
27.SATK: After attacking, deploys a Power Shield that blocks nearly all physical and magical damage for a set duration.

28.NAME: Firebird Ⅱ
28.NATK: Soars through the sky and launches flaming shots from extreme range.
28.SATK: Fires a powerful fireball that deals greater damage and stuns enemies with a higher chance.

29.NAME: Gunner Ⅱ
29.NATK: Attacks enemies from a distance with precise shots.
29.SATK: Fires an enhanced bullet that guarantees a longer stun on enemies.

30.NAME: Hammer Knight Ⅱ
30.NATK: Delivers a powerful melee strike with a heavy hammer.
30.SATK: Slams a wider area with a powerful strike, dealing heavy damage, stunning enemies with a higher chance, and can activate Taunt.

31.NAME: Mounted Knight Ⅱ
31.NATK: Strikes with rapid melee combos. Killing an enemy grants a movement speed buff.
31.SATK: Delivers an enhanced combo attack alternating between the main target and nearby enemies. Activates Taunt after a set number of uses.

32.NAME: Elf Archer Ⅱ
32.NATK: Fires arrows to attack enemies from a distance.
32.SATK: Fires 3 arrows at once, striking up to 3 enemies simultaneously.

33.NAME: Elf Warrior Ⅱ
33.NATK: Attacks enemies with a melee double-hit.
33.SATK: Unleashes a 3-hit combo at 1.5x power, dealing heavy melee damage.

34.NAME: Poison Archer Ⅱ
34.NATK: Fires a poison arrow that reduces enemies' movement speed and attack speed.
34.SATK: Fires a poison arrow at 1.5x power, creating a poison cloud that slows nearby enemies.

35.NAME: High Elf Archer Ⅱ
35.NATK: Launches precise magic arrows at an increased fire rate to attack from range.
35.SATK: Fires a rapid volley of magic arrows, striking multiple enemies at once.

36.NAME: Green Eagle Ⅱ
36.NATK: Soars through the air, firing ranged projectiles at enemies below.
36.SATK: Launches 3 wind blasts in succession, damaging enemies and knocking them back.

37.NAME: Wind Mage Ⅱ
37.NATK: Fires an energy ball to attack enemies from a distance.
37.SATK: Summons a tornado for longer, hitting more enemies and dealing sustained damage.

38.NAME: Skeleton Soldier Ⅱ
38.NATK: Attacks enemies with a bone in melee combat.
38.SATK: Delivers a powerful heavy strike for massive damage with a high chance to stun.

39.NAME: Dark Mage Ⅱ
39.NATK: Unleashes dark projectiles at an increased fire rate for ranged attacks.
39.SATK: Launches a dark orb that deals even greater damage to enemies.

40.NAME: Ghost Ⅱ
40.NATK: Hurls ghost orbs at an increased fire rate for ranged attacks.
40.SATK: Turns invisible for a longer duration, evading enemy attacks.

41.NAME: Skeleton Warrior Ⅱ
41.NATK: Attacks enemies with a melee double-hit.
41.SATK: From stealth, unleashes a furious rapid-fire combo that deals massive damage.

42.NAME: Great Hammer Ⅱ
42.NATK: Swings a hammer in melee combat with a chance to stun enemies.
42.SATK: Strikes with devastating power, dealing heavy damage over a wider area with a high chance to stun.

43.NAME: Dark Sorcerer Ⅱ
43.NATK: Fires dark projectiles at an increased fire rate. Periodically summons a skeleton soldier.
43.SATK: Curses more enemies, shields more allies, and summons skeletons to fight at your side.

44.NAME: Orc Fighter Ⅱ
44.NATK: Attacks enemies with a melee double-hit.
44.SATK: Strikes with tremendous force, dealing even greater damage and sending enemies flying farther back.

45.NAME: Orc Hunter Ⅱ
45.NATK: Attacks enemies with a basic melee strike.
45.SATK: Teleports to the farthest enemy, delivering a more powerful strike and freezing them for longer. Grants yourself a ranged evasion buff.

46.NAME: Ice Mage Ⅱ
46.NATK: Fires enhanced ice magic projectiles at an increased fire rate, with a chance to strike additional targets.
46.SATK: Fires an enhanced freezing projectile that deals heavy damage to enemies.

47.NAME: Orc Wing Ⅱ
47.NATK: Fires energy projectiles from the air for ranged attacks.
47.SATK: Fires an enhanced energy projectile that deals heavy damage.

48.NAME: Orc Axeman Ⅱ
48.NATK: Strikes with an axe in melee, dealing wider AoE damage to enemies ahead.
48.SATK: After a melee attack, hurls more axes to strike additional enemies. Can also hit airborne targets.

49.NAME: Orc Hammerman Ⅱ
49.NATK: Swings a hammer to deal AoE damage to nearby enemies.
49.SATK: Summons an ice clone for a longer duration to take hits in your place.

50.NAME: Wolf Rider Ⅱ
50.NATK: Deals AoE damage to nearby enemies along with a melee attack.
50.SATK: Increases the number of wolves that can be summoned and strengthens the movement speed and attack speed buffs granted to nearby allies. Activates Taunt after a set number of uses.

51.NAME: Unicorn Archer
51.NATK: Fires arcing arrows that can hit up to 3 enemies at once.
51.SATK: Fires a volley of arcing arrows in succession, dealing damage to enemies across a wide area.

52.NAME: Unicorn Archer Ⅱ
52.NATK: Fires arcing arrows that can hit up to 3 enemies at once.
52.SATK: Fires more arcing arrows at a faster rate, dealing damage to enemies across a wide area.

53.NAME: Fairy
53.NATK: Soars through the sky and attacks from range with music-note bullets.
53.SATK: Grants nearby allies a buff that restores HP and mana, and increases movement speed.

54.NAME: Fairy Ⅱ
54.NATK: Soars through the sky and attacks from range with music-note bullets.
54.SATK: Restores more HP and mana to nearby allies, with a stronger movement speed boost.

55.NAME: Priest
55.NATK: Attacks from range with light energy and has a chance to stun enemies.
55.SATK: Restores HP for all allies and grants them a shield.

56.NAME: Priest Ⅱ
56.NATK: Attacks from range with light energy and has a chance to stun enemies.
56.SATK: Greatly restores HP for all allies and grants them an enhanced shield.

57.NAME: Dark Archer
57.NATK: Fires silence-infused arrows to hit multiple enemies at once. Defeated enemies have a chance to revive as allied soldiers.
57.SATK: Fires an enhanced arrow that deals heavy damage to multiple enemies and applies a long silence.

58.NAME: Dark Archer Ⅱ
58.NATK: Fires silence-infused arrows to hit more enemies at once. Defeated enemies have a higher chance to revive as allied soldiers.
58.SATK: Fires an enhanced arrow that hits even more enemies with heavy damage and an even longer silence.

59.NAME: Death Knight
59.NATK: Delivers a heavy melee strike that deals AoE damage to enemies ahead and has a chance to inflict Curse.
59.SATK: Summons skeleton soldiers to support you in battle.

60.NAME: Death Knight Ⅱ
60.NATK: Delivers a heavy melee strike that deals AoE damage to enemies ahead and has a higher chance to inflict Curse.
60.SATK: Summons stronger skeleton soldiers to support you in battle.

61.NAME: Bigfoot
61.NATK: Deals AoE damage to nearby enemies with its huge body and has a chance to freeze them.
61.SATK: Unleashes a powerful AoE strike forward, freezing multiple enemies.

62.NAME: Golem
62.NATK: Deals AoE damage to nearby enemies with its giant fists and has a chance to stun them.
62.SATK: Deals a powerful AoE strike and deploys a physical barrier. Using it a set number of times triggers a taunt.

63.NAME: Hand of Death
63.NATK: Delivers a melee attack with a powerful fist that knocks enemies back.
63.SATK: Unleashes consecutive AoE attacks forward, launching multiple enemies into the air.

64.NAME: Wolf Warrior
64.NATK: Teleports to enemies and unleashes an assassination-style combo attack.
64.SATK: Teleports up to 10 times to deliver a chain of strikes, then taunts enemies to draw their attacks.

65.NAME: Ent
65.NATK: Performs a melee attack with its massive body, dealing AoE damage to nearby enemies.
65.SATK: Drops a boulder onto enemies, launching them into the air.

66.NAME: Fire Mage
66.NATK: Fires flaming magic projectiles to attack enemies from range.
66.SATK: Summons multiple fire birds that spread damage across enemies.

67.NAME: Ice Mage
67.NATK: Fires ice shards to attack enemies from range.
67.SATK: Unleashes a barrage of ice rain on multiple enemies in range, dealing spread damage.

68.NAME: Bomber
68.NATK: Throws multiple small bombs for ranged attacks. After defeating a certain number of enemies, enters a frenzy state.
68.SATK: Detects the densest enemy cluster and drops 2 large bombs on that location.

69.NAME: Drums of the Battlefield
69.NATK: Supports allies by beating a drum instead of attacking.
69.SATK: Temporarily increases ATK, attack speed, and movement speed for all allied heroes.

70.NAME: Bigfoot Ⅱ
70.NATK: Deals AoE damage to nearby enemies with its massive body and has a chance to freeze them.
70.SATK: Strikes forward in a wider area with a powerful blow, freezing multiple enemies.

71.NAME: Golem Ⅱ
71.NATK: Deals AoE damage to more enemies with its giant fists and has a higher chance to stun them.
71.SATK: Deals a powerful AoE strike and deploys a physical barrier. Taunt activates after a set number of uses.

72.NAME: Hand of Death Ⅱ
72.NATK: Delivers a melee attack with a powerful fist that knocks enemies back.
72.SATK: Strikes forward with consecutive attacks in a wider area, launching multiple enemies even higher into the air.

73.NAME: Wolf Warrior Ⅱ
73.NATK: Teleports to enemies and unleashes an assassination-style combo attack.
73.SATK: Teleports up to 10 times to unleash a chain of attacks, then taunts enemies to draw their attacks. Teleport chain attacks can also trigger during normal attacks.

74.NAME: Ent Ⅱ
74.NATK: Performs a melee attack with its massive body, dealing damage to a wider area of enemies.
74.SATK: Drops more boulders to launch enemies into the air.

75.NAME: Fire Mage Ⅱ
75.NATK: Fires flaming magic projectiles to attack enemies from range.
75.SATK: Summons more fire birds to deal spread damage to enemies.

76.NAME: Ice Mage Ⅱ
76.NATK: Fires ice shards continuously to attack enemies from range.
76.SATK: Unleashes a barrage of ice rain over a larger area, dealing spread damage to enemies.

77.NAME: Bomber Ⅱ
77.NATK: Throws more small bombs for ranged attacks. After defeating a certain number of enemies, enters a stronger frenzy state.
77.SATK: Detects the densest enemy cluster and drops 3 large bombs on the location.

78.NAME: Drums of the Battlefield Ⅱ
78.NATK: Supports allies by beating a drum instead of attacking.
78.SATK: Further boosts ATK, attack speed, and movement speed of all allied heroes for a limited time.

79.NAME: Pilot
79.NATK: Fires consecutive shots from the air at multiple enemies.
79.SATK: Launches a missile and taunts 1 enemy, forcing them to target you.

80.NAME: Pilot Ⅱ
80.NATK: Fires consecutive shots from the air at more enemies.
80.SATK: Fires more missiles and taunts 1 enemy, forcing them to target you.

81.NAME: Forest Guardian
81.NATK: Fires magic arrows at enemies within range.
81.SATK: Attacks multiple enemies at once with a barrage of arrows, and has a chance to grant itself a Speed Up buff.

82.NAME: Steam Punk
82.NATK: Fires a homing missile that has a chance to stun 2 enemies.
82.SATK: Fires multiple missiles at enemies within range.

83.NAME: Raptor Rider
83.NATK: Throws spears at enemies within range.
83.SATK: Throws multiple spears that have a chance to Freeze enemies within range.

84.NAME: Forest Guardian Ⅱ
84.NATK: Fires magic arrows at more enemies within range.
84.SATK: Attacks multiple enemies at once with a volley of arrows, and has a chance to grant itself an enhanced Speed buff.

85.NAME: Steam Punk Ⅱ
85.NATK: Fires a homing missile that has a chance to stun 3 enemies.
85.SATK: Fires multiple missiles at enemies within range, with a chance to fire additional missiles.

86.NAME: Raptor Rider Ⅱ
86.NATK: Throws a spear at more enemies within range.
86.SATK: Throws several spears that have a chance to Freeze enemies within range.

87.NAME: Dark Ninja
87.NATK: Teleports to an enemy at random and unleashes a series of close-range attacks, restoring a small amount of HP with each hit.
87.SATK: Fires a Dark Chain to pull in distant enemies (including airborne units), then attacks nearby enemies with a spinning attack.

88.NAME: Dark Ninja Ⅱ
88.NATK: Teleports to an enemy with a chance and unleashes enhanced consecutive melee attacks, restoring more HP with each hit.
88.SATK: Fires Dark Chain to pull in 2 distant enemies (including aerial units), then strikes nearby enemies with a spinning attack.

89.NAME: Winged Knight
89.NATK:
Deals 3 consecutive hits to enemies and also damages nearby enemies. The final hit knocks enemies back.
Flash: After defeating a set number of enemies, an Attack and Haste buff is triggered, and each kill instantly moves you to the next target.
Survival: When HP falls below a certain level, a shield is briefly formed and attack speed and attack power greatly increase.
89.SATK: Teleports to an enemy and deals area damage to nearby enemies.

90.NAME: Sylphid
90.NATK:
Fires shurikens in rapid succession, and each hit gradually increases attack speed.
Rage: When attack speed reaches its maximum, additional shurikens are fired with each normal attack.
90.SATK: Fire tornados in succession to deal damage to enemies.

91.NAME: Abyss Mage
91.NATK: When you attack an enemy, chain lightning jumps to nearby enemies, dealing gradually reduced damage. Restore mana when defeating an enemy.
91.SATK: Strikes multiple enemies in range with lightning in succession, dealing AoE damage and briefly inflicting Shock, disabling their actions.

92.NAME: Wyvern Rider
92.NATK:
Throws daggers at multiple enemies, dealing damage.
Depending on the number of enemies defeated since the last skill, fires additional boomerang daggers on the next skill.
92.SATK:
Fires daggers at multiple enemies.
When a dagger hits, it freezes the target and spreads daggers outward in all directions from that spot, freezing enemies in their path before exploding after a short time.

93.NAME: Winged Knight Ⅱ
93.NATK:
Deals 3 consecutive hits to enemies and also damages nearby enemies. The final hit knocks enemies back.
Flash: After defeating a set number of enemies, an Attack and Haste buff is triggered, and each kill instantly moves you to the next target.
Survival: When HP falls below a certain level, a shield is briefly formed and attack speed and attack power greatly increase.
93.SATK: Teleports to an enemy and deals area damage to nearby enemies.

94.NAME: Sylphid Ⅱ
94.NATK:
Fires shurikens in rapid succession, and each hit gradually increases attack speed.
Rage: When attack speed reaches its maximum, additional shurikens are fired with each normal attack.
94.SATK: Fire tornados in succession to deal damage to enemies.

95.NAME: Abyss Mage Ⅱ
95.NATK: When you attack an enemy, chain lightning jumps to nearby enemies, dealing gradually reduced damage. Restore mana when defeating an enemy.
95.SATK: Strikes multiple enemies in range with lightning in succession, dealing AoE damage and briefly inflicting Shock, disabling their actions.

96.NAME: Wyvern Rider Ⅱ
96.NATK:
Throws daggers at multiple enemies, dealing damage.
Depending on the number of enemies defeated since the last skill, fires additional boomerang daggers on the next skill.
96.SATK:
Fires daggers at multiple enemies.
When a dagger hits, it freezes the target and spreads daggers outward in all directions from that spot, freezing enemies in their path before exploding after a short time.
